# Voice Lint Fixture — Heuristic Warnings

This fixture deliberately uses internal terms without a gloss-shaped
follow-up in the same paragraph. The script must exit 0 (warnings do not
fail the lint) and emit one or more INTERNAL-TERM-WITHOUT-GLOSS warnings.

## Heuristic check — bare internal terms

The closure ledger ran cleanly.

The Bootstrap path applied to the new session.

Fast Lane processed the request without confirmation.

Each Router handles its own pipeline stage.
